title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: If you are new to TwizzTools or want to understand how each feature works, this guide helps you understand free tools for your creative workflow.

general.question: What is TwizzTools?
general.answer: TwizzTools is a collection of free tools to help creative workflows, especially Instagram content.

general.question: How do I start using TwizzTools?
general.answer: Choose the tool you need from the homepage, then follow the instructions on that tool page.

general.question: Which platforms are supported?
general.answer: TwizzTools runs in modern browsers on desktop and mobile.

general.question: Is there a mobile app?
general.answer: There is no separate mobile app yet. All features can be used directly from the browser.

general.question: How do I contact support?
general.answer: Use the contact channel available on the website or project repository.

plansPricing.question: Is TwizzTools free?
plansPricing.answer: Yes, all TwizzTools features are 100% free to use without limits.

plansPricing.question: Is there a premium version?
plansPricing.answer: There are currently no plans for a premium version. All tools will remain free.

plansPricing.question: Do I need to register or log in?
plansPricing.answer: No registration is required. Access and use the tool you need directly.

privacy.question: Are uploaded images stored?
privacy.answer: No. All editing processes run directly in your browser. Images are not sent to the server.

privacy.question: Is my data safe?
privacy.answer: Yes. Because all processes run in the browser, your data does not leave your device.

privacy.question: Does TwizzTools use cookies?
privacy.answer: Only for analytics and theme preferences. No personal data is collected.

responsibleAi.question: Is AI Caption Generator safe to use?
responsibleAi.answer: Yes. AI Caption uses the official Google Gemini API with rate limits to prevent misuse.

responsibleAi.question: Are generated captions original?
responsibleAi.answer: AI generates captions based on the context you provide. Results are unique, but you should still review and edit them to match your brand voice.

responsibleAi.question: What is the daily caption generation limit?
responsibleAi.answer: Maximum 5 captions per day to prevent spam and keep service quality optimal.
